title: CapabilityManifest
description: Schema for kruon adapter capability manifests (snapshots/*.json). Expresses schema_version, adapter/tool/version identity, approval_mode, interfaces, per-capability support status with evidence level, and notes. approval_mode MUST be honestly exposed per adapter: Codex exec = sandbox_policy_only (no per-action channel); Claude manual = per_action (inferred, not run-loop-proven).

schema_version.description: Capability manifest schema version. Bumped on breaking change.

version.description: Observed tool version; null if not yet captured.

approval_mode.description: Approval capability of this adapter. per_action = each high-risk action yields a bound approval request. sandbox_policy_only = no per-action channel; risk bounded by frozen pre-launch sandbox/policy. none = no approval gating. Codex exec is sandbox_policy_only; Claude manual targets per_action (inferred).

evidence.description: Evidence level for this interface declaration.

approval_mode.description: Approval mode this interface provides, if applicable.

choices_documented.description: Documented choices for this interface (e.g. permission mode values).

capabilities.description: Per-capability support status. Keys are capability names (e.g. per_action_approval, sandbox_policy, structured_output).

evidence.description: Evidence level: verified = demonstrated by real run / help-text capture; inferred = documented but not run-loop-proven; unverified = claimed but not yet checked; unsupported = confirmed absent.

reason.description: Explanation of the evidence level or support status.

forbidden_in_kruon.description: True if kruon explicitly forbids using this capability.

flags.description: Relevant CLI flags for this capability.

modes.description: Available modes / values for this capability.

via.description: How this capability is accessed (e.g. CLI flag, subcommand).

notes.description: Free-form notes about this capability snapshot.
